name: Create Bill via API, Approve via UI, Pay via API then Verify

steps.name: Click locator('div[role="option"], [role="menuitem"], li, .chakra-menu__menuitem, button').filter({ hasText: /System Admin/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').first().locator('button').filter({ hasText: /^(Advance|Submit|Approve|Save|Confirm)$/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Click locator('div[role="option"], [role="menuitem"], li, .chakra-menu__menuitem, button').filter({ hasText: /System Admin/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Wait for selector getByRole('dialog').first().locator('button').filter({ hasText: /^(Advance|Submit|Approve|Save|Confirm)$/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()

Click locator('button').filter({ hasText: /^(Submkt For Review|Submit For Review|Submir For Review|Submit For Reviewer|Submt For Review|Submit For Approver|Submit Forapprover|Submit For Approve|Submit For Apporver|Advance|Approve|Approver|Submit)$/i }).filter({ visible: true }).first()
Expect "toContainText" locator('div, p, span').filter({ hasText: /Unpaid Amount/i }).locator('..').first()

retries.statusDetails: Error: [CRITICAL] Backend Error Prevented Approval: "Server error! Something went wrong (E1481) The approver was assigned! You have successfully assigned an approver."
